name: You are Never Alone
short_description: A horror maze game with the purpose to escape. Lost in a maze that is oddly familiar, you must remember how to escape without them finding you. Avoid "them" while you collect your memories to get out without being followed.
detailed_description:
Retiring the game

Hello everyone, Jason here and I am announcing the retirement of the game. The game is not good, which is why I sold it for a dollar, purely to TRY and make up for the amount that I put into it. The game started with high hopes, but as it went along and I lost help working on it, it became a shell of the ultimate idea for it. As I am not officially releasing new games, that are dramatically different from this one and of much higher quality, I do not want anyone believing the quality of this game is the quality I usually demand and require of myself. Thank you for listening, and I hope you enjoy the future games I release and forget the nightmare that is this one.


About the Game

Lost in a nightmarish maze that is oddly familiar, you must remember how to escape without them finding you. Be careful though, "they" have unique powers and if you don't find all your memories, they will follow you to the outside. The only exit is closed. You must collect enough Memories for it to open, even when it is opened, you may need more to survive. Two different endings based on the players ability to find what they need. Based on the mindset of a character from 'Hidden Life.' Created by Jason Hanes.
